mermaidSyntax:
graph LR subgraph Screening["Screening Period - Weeks -4 to 0"] A[Informed Consent
Week -4] --> B[Eligibility
Assessment] B --> C[Baseline
Measurements] end subgraph Treatment["Treatment Period - Weeks 0-52"] C --> D{Randomization
Week 0} D -->|Treatment Arm| E[Drug X 10mg
Daily Dosing] D -->|Control Arm| F[Placebo
Daily Dosing] E --> G[Follow-up Visits
Weeks 4, 12, 26] F --> H[Follow-up Visits
Weeks 4, 12, 26] G --> I[Primary Endpoint
Week 52] H --> I end subgraph Extension["Extension Period - Weeks 52-104"] I --> J[Open-Label Extension
Optional] end I --> K[Safety Follow-up
Week 56] style D fill:#f59e0b,stroke:#d97706,color:#000 style E fill:#3b82f6,stroke:#1e40af,color:#fff style F fill:#ef4444,stroke:#b91c1c,color:#fff style J fill:#6b7280,stroke:#4b5563,color:#fff,stroke-dasharray: 5 5 style K fill:#10b981,stroke:#047857,color:#fff
